title: Iron Grate
description: adds the iron grate to the game
body:
adds the iron grate to the game wish is a decoration block semilart in properties to the copper grate

### its a vanilla inspired block with so much building potential :




plans for the mod:
- support for all 21 version
- ~~connected textures support~~
- pbr shader support
- support for other mods
- appearing in structures in other mods
